action: Send five targeted messages to AI founders asking whether enterprise security questionnaires have delayed a deal and offering a paid readiness review.
expected_signal: A serious reply, booked call, paid review request, referral, or clear objection.
give_up_rule: If there are no replies after two follow-ups, record weak segment signal and test a different buyer path.
target_personas: Head of sales at small AI vendor
success_criteria: At least one serious reply, booked call, or paid review request.
notes: Do not build templates before founder validation.
